meanings.definition: appear or become visible; make a showing
examples: She turned up at the funeral
I hope the list key is going to surface again
Did your latest book appear yet?
The new Woody Allen film hasn't come out yet
Water issued from the hole in the wall
The words seemed to come out by themselves
How will the game turn out?
His hair and teeth fell out

meanings.definition: take a place in a competition; often followed by an ordinal
examples: Jerry came in third in the Marathon
Young people should step to the fore and help their peers

meanings.definition: to state openly and publicly one's homosexuality
be made known; be disclosed or revealed

examples: The tooth erupted and had to be extracted
